sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30188" key="e)gkatasbe/nnumi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγκατα-σβέννῡμι</orth> or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγκατα-ύω</orth>, <sense id="n30188.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">quench in</tr_> a thing, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὸ λογικὸν ἐγκατές βεσται τῆσψυχῆς</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.975c</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">987d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
